---
title: resume
---

# Emily E. Hatch

Technical Problem Solver

ehatche@gmail.com • (206) 661-8497

LinkedIn: <http://www.linkedin.com/in/emily-hatch-byui>


### Professional Interests

Network administration, cybersecurity, IT support, cloud technologies, software development, and solving technical problems.

## Education

`2022–2026`
__Brigham Young University–Idaho__, Rexburg, ID

- Bachelor of Science in Computer Information Technology
- Expected Graduation: July 2026
- GPA: 3.5
- CompTIA Security+ Certification

## Experience

`Jan. 2026 – Apr. 2026`
__Network Admin Intern__, Sandhill Media Group, Idaho Falls, ID

- Configured and implemented two separate subnets to improve network segmentation with AI-assisted planning.
- Delivered Tier 1 technical support for Windows and macOS users, minimizing downtime.
- Assisted with troubleshooting network and workstation issues.

`Apr. 2025 – Sept. 2025`
__Baker__, Jacob Lake Inn, Fredonia, AZ

- Worked efficiently in a fast-paced team environment.
- Maintained quality standards while meeting production deadlines.

`May 2024 – Aug. 2024`
__Applied Tech Intern__, Dimension Studios, London, UK

- Completed technical projects involving C++ programming and Shader development in Unreal Engine.
- Worked independently while collaborating effectively with team members both remotely and in person.

`Nov. 2021 – May 2023`
__Full-Time Volunteer__, The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints, Ogden, UT

- Served in a leadership role as a trainer for new volunteers.
- Worked approximately 70 hours per week developing communication, leadership, and organizational skills.

`Aug. 2021 – Nov. 2021`
__Emissions Compliance Intern__, PACCAR, Bellevue, WA

- Used Microsoft Office to compile emissions regulations into presentations for senior management.
- Organized technical information into professional reports.

## Projects

`2025`
__Hackathon Volunteer__

- Assisted with logistics and event operations to ensure a successful hackathon.

## Technical Skills

### Networking

- Cisco Packet Tracer
- Router and switch configuration
- Network troubleshooting
- Subnetting

### Programming

- HTML
- CSS
- JavaScript
- SQL
- C++
- Unreal Engine Shaders

### Cloud & Tools

- AWS
- GitHub
- Microsoft Office

### Operating Systems

- Windows
- macOS

### Certifications

- CompTIA Security+

## Leadership

`2021–2023`
__Full-Time Volunteer__, The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints

- Trained and mentored new volunteers.
- Developed leadership, communication, and teamwork skills through full-time service.


<!-- ### Footer

Last updated: JULY 2026 -->
